title: Device Settings - All toggles OFF - Persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Device Settings toggle buttons do not persist as OFF after closing and reopening tabs, returning to Device Home Screen, or restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings
Set all toggle buttons (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, etc.) to OFF
Close the Device Settings tab and reopen it
Return to the Device Home Screen
Navigate back to Device Settings → [Device Name]
Restart the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings
expected: All toggle buttons remain OFF after closing and reopening tabs, returning to the Device Home Screen, and restarting the app.
